hero.lead: Refined photography & videography for the moments that matter — weddings, events, brands and the people behind them.

about.heading: Considered, unhurried imagery
about.p1: We're drawn to the moments you'd otherwise forget — the glance, the gathering, the small detail — and we shape them into images that feel as alive as the day they happened.
about.p2: Founded by Patrick Selasie Dugo and built as a collaborative practice, Selasie Visual Studio works closely with you before a single frame is made: your story, your pace, your light.
about.p3: Every gallery is finished in our signature style and delivered privately — images made to be lived with, returned to, and loved long after the day has passed.

services.title: Brand & Content
services.text: Restaurant and brand imagery that makes people stop scrolling — half-day shoots, monthly retainers available.

services.title: Corporate & Headshots
services.text: Headshots and workplace photography that make your team look like themselves — at their very best.

services.title: Events & Celebrations
services.text: Birthdays, launches and milestones — the candid in-between moments and every key set-piece.

services.title: Weddings
services.text: Your day, captured with care — timeless coverage, 300+ images, film and album add-ons.

coming_soon: Coming soon — hybrid wedding films & 360° virtual tours
pricing_terms: A 50% non-refundable deposit secures your date · balance before delivery · private online gallery for 30 days · full terms apply.

testimonials.quote: They didn't just take photos — they captured exactly how the day felt. We look at the gallery and we're right back there.
testimonials.name: — EDIT: a real client

testimonials.quote: Professional, calm, and the images are stunning. Our brand finally looks the way it should online.
